channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: NASA's Webb telescope finds planet where rock clouds vanish nightly
item.description: A giant planet 700 light-years away has a daily weather cycle where mineral clouds appear each morning and disappear by nightfall. Using...

item.title: Tiny 'sesame' sea slug discovered in Taiwan is a new species
item.description: A sea slug smaller than a sesame seed was found in Taiwan's coastal waters, and its tiny size and uniqueness led scientists to realize they had discovered...

item.title: NSF launches Tech Accelerators initiative to speed key technologies to market
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation announced the NSF Tech Accelerators initiative to accelerate the transfer of research outputs from basic research to commercial applications.

item.title: NASA's Fermi telescope reveals power source behind monster supernovae
item.description: NASA's Fermi telescope has detected what may be the first confirmed gamma-ray signal from a superluminous supernova, one of the most extreme types of stellar explosions.
